home.heroSubtitle: Free dance, meditation, yoga, sound journeys and retreats — in Switzerland and beyond, hand-picked one by one by Didier.
home.didierTitle: Chosen with heart, reviewed by Didier
home.didierText: ForTheSoul is not just another directory: every practitioner and every experience is personally reviewed by Didier Picamoles, founder of the platform and creator of Humanic Dance. What you book has been lived, met, chosen.
home.heroBadge1: Reviewed one by one by Didier
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find the practice that calls you
home.didierQuote: I only share experiences I've lived and people I've met. That's ForTheSoul.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything to know before you begin

items.a: A Swiss platform of conscious experiences — dance, meditation, yoga, sound journeys, retreats — hand-picked one by one by Didier Picamoles. No algorithm, just real encounters.
Every practitioner and every experience is personally reviewed by Didier. What gets published has been lived, met, chosen.

items.q: How do I join an experience ?
items.a: Browse the catalogue, open the listing that speaks to you and follow the instructions to contact the practitioner or book. Save your favourites.
Not to explore and save favourites (tied to your device). An account is only needed for practitioners who want to publish.

items.q: I'm a practitioner, how do I publish ?
items.a: Create a practitioner account, complete your profile (reviewed by Didier), then submit your experiences. Each publication uses one credit.
Mostly across French- and German-speaking Switzerland, with a few immersions abroad. Use the 'near me' search to find experiences close to you.

events.title: All experiences
events.subtitle: Search by mood, date or distance — everything reviewed, everything alive.
events.searchPlaceholder: Free search: dance, breathwork, singing bowls…

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.help: Dotted days offer at least one experience. Click to filter, click two dates for a range.

events.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No experiences} one {# experience} other {# experiences}}
events.empty: No experience matches these criteria — widen your search or come back soon: the programme evolves every week.

event.recurrenceNote: This experience returns regularly — check the other dates.
event.notFound: This experience doesn't exist or is no longer online.
event.reserveNote: No online payment: clicking “Book” contacts the practitioner directly by email. Payment (any deposit or on-site) is arranged directly with them.

about.title: The ForTheSoul story
about.metaDescription: ForTheSoul was born from Didier Picamoles' conviction: transformative experiences are chosen with the heart, not by an algorithm.
